claims: The skill's "allowed-tools" includes "Bash(aws:*)", granting unrestricted access to all AWS CLI commands. While generating AWS Lambda functions may require some AWS operations, full "aws:*" permissions allow actions far beyond Lambda generation (e.g., modifying any AWS resource, accessing sensitive data in S3, altering IAM policies). This is excessive for the stated purpose and creates privilege escalation risks.
